{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322194813865841A33722893433F4"}"},"total":1006},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7221918935627694886","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"总之作者对战斗力把控还是可以的，当然综漫的问题本作也有比如动漫没看过看不懂剧情。简单说就是写细了看过这动漫的不愿意，写不细没看过的不明白，[捂脸]而且本身选取的是优秀作品改编也有难度全是细节，至少对我这种看过动漫的能挑出小毛病，当然不是战斗力那种，不过不影响，总体还算可以。最后还是有个问题作者比较老的，小众的漫画都加了，但是一部比较刀的漫画都没有，难道作者没看过比较刀的漫画？"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1681484123,"group_id":"7195812012251679799","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"6667737889"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7195812012251679799","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.5916476e+07"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读9小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":723,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":33241,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7221914367603835651","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书主打聊天群，题材虽是综漫，但还是以龙珠同人为主，即便是加的动漫角色大多也是耳熟能详的，不过后期主角存在感偏低，个人感觉应该是因为选取的动漫人物都是后期即使不依靠聊天群也能成就一番霸业的存在，比较有自己的个性，所以突显不出主角作用。
聊天群不同动漫角色目前只是局限线上聊天，对话比较有逻辑，也有顾及到每个人说话风格，所以比较舒服不会太突兀，而且作者有加一些同一个世界的人来促进线下互动，并且有考虑后期线下聚会内容值得期待。
至于战斗力方面把控，总能看到说龙珠战斗力爆表，应该把其他世界的角色秒了。首先官方有过龙珠和海贼王的联动。悟空没有把路飞一拳秒了。其次战斗差的多但打的时间长这个是龙珠传统，不信可以看一遍老版龙珠，无用的打斗占了多久，其次一拳秒的传统是一拳超人带来的风气，龙珠人物对自己力量把控很好。","text_exts":[{"e":8,"s":5,"text":"聊天群","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%81%8A%E5%A4%A9%E7%BE%A4&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774180093893433F4%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227221914367603835651%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227195812012251679799%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%81%8A%E5%A4%A9%E7%BE%A4%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":262,"s":259,"text":"海贼王","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%B5%B7%E8%B4%BC%E7%8E%8B&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774180093893433F4%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227221914367603835651%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227195812012251679799%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%B5%B7%E8%B4%BC%E7%8E%8B%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":334,"s":330,"text":"一拳超人","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%B8%80%E6%8B%B3%E8%B6%85%E4%BA%BA&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774180093893433F4%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227221914367603835651%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227195812012251679799%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%B8%80%E6%8B%B3%E8%B6%85%E4%BA%BA%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1681483093,"group_id":"7195812012251679799","s
